name: Vermillion High School
description: Vermillion High School is a place to play pickleball in Vermillion, SD. There are 4 outdoor acrylic courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.

name: Vermillion SD Armory
description: Come play pickleball at Vermillion SD Armory in Vermillion, SD! There are 2 indoor acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. You can reserve the courts. Amenities include locker rooms, restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.
